videos.headline: Clemson captures ACC title with walk-off 56-yard FG
videos.description: Nolan Hauser buries a field goal from 56 yards out to push Clemson over SMU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson wins ACC title with walk-off 56-yard FG) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson comes away with a strip-sack on the opening drive
videos.description: T.J. Parker comes up big with a strip-sack on the opening drive of the ACC championship.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson comes away with a strip-sack on the opening drive) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cade Klubnik finds a wide-open Bryant Wesco for a Clemson TD
videos.description: Bryant Wesco Jr. hauls in the dime from Cade Klubnik to put the Tigers on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cade Klubnik finds a wide-open Bryant Wesco for a Clemson TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jake Briningstool plows across the goal line for a Clemson TD
videos.description: Cade Klubnik fires a dart to Jake Briningstool who muscles his way into the end zone to give the Tigers a quick 14-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jake Briningstool plows across the goal line for a Clemson TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kevin Jennings keeps it himself for a 24-yard SMU TD
videos.description: Kevin Jennings shows out the jets as he outruns Clemson's defense for a 24-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kevin Jennings keeps it himself for a 24-yard SMU TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson's Bryant Wesco breaks 2 tackles on way to 43-yard TD
videos.description: Bryant Wesco Jr. hauls in the rock, breaks two tackles and finds pay dirt to pad the Tigers' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bryant Wesco breaks 2 tackles on his way to a 43-yard TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Daniels' impressive grab sets up Smith's 10-yard receiving TD for SMU
videos.description: Roderick Daniels Jr. makes an impressive grab, then Kevin Jennings finds Brashard Smith for a Mustangs touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Daniels' impressive grab sets up Smith's 10-yard receiving TD for SMU) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cade Klubnik dimes Jake Briningstool for his 4th passing TD
videos.description: Jake Briningstool hauls in the dime from Cade Klubnik to extend the Tigers' lead in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cade Klubnik dimes Jake Briningstool for his 4th passing TD) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kevin Jennings finds Brashard Smith to pull SMU closer in the 4th quarter
videos.description: Brashard Smith hauls in the dime from Kevin Jennings to pull the Mustangs closer in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kevin Jennings finds Brashard Smith to pull SMU closer in the 4th quarter) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Roderick Daniels' awesome toe-tapping TD ties the score for SMU
videos.description: Roderick Daniels Jr. keeps both feet in bounds to tie the score with under 20 seconds left in regulation.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Roderick Daniels' awesome toe-tapping TD ties the score for SMU) 2024/12/07 ESHEET
